summary: Interactive romantic love letter web page titled 'A Letter for Priya' — features an animated envelope with a wax seal, a hidden letter that reveals on click, sparkle background, and elegant typography using Dancing Script, Playfair Display, and Poppins fonts.
architectural_notes: Single-page HTML/CSS/JS app with no backend — all content is inline
Envelope open/close toggle handled via CSS class 'open' on .envelope-wrapper
Letter animates out of envelope using CSS transitions on bottom, height, opacity, and transform

existing_features.title: Replace the current SealButton/LetterContainer/LetterContent reveal flow with an animated envelope component that matches the provided HTML design: a burgundy (#800020) envelope with a triangular flap (::before pseudo-element), two-tone side/bottom panels (::after), and a circular wax seal centered on the envelope body displaying a gold heart (♥). Clicking the envelope toggles an 'open' state that flips the flap via rotateX(180deg), hides the wax seal, and animates the letter rising out of the envelope.

Style the revealed letter panel using the provided design: parchment background (#fdf5e6), 1px border (#e0d0b0), padding 30px, scrollable overflow-y, with letter content using Playfair Display serif at 16px line-height 1.6. The letter header uses Dancing Script 28px in burgundy (#800020) with a gold (#d4af37) bottom border. The letter body text is dark (#333), justified, with a 20px bottom margin.

Update the page background to a dark radial gradient (radial-gradient(circle, #1a1a1a 0%, #000 100%)) to match the provided design, replacing the current muted romantic gradient. Retain the existing StarBackground animated particle layer above the background.
Load Google Fonts for Dancing Script (weight 600), Playfair Display (regular 400, bold 700, italic 400), and Poppins (weight 300) via the index.html <head>, in addition to any existing font imports.
